title: crotalaria verrucosa var. semperflorens
intro: Crotalaria verrucosa var. semperflorens, also known as the hairy rattle pod or hairy rattle bush, is a perennial herb native to tropical regions of Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria verrucosa var. semperflorens include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments, although its use is not widely recognized in modern medicine and may require further research for its safety and efficacy.
